CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2022 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-21-590596 WITH CASE CGC-22-598595
Off Calendar Aug-31-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. LOREN SCHWARTZ, Esq. of Dunn & Panagotacos LLP (Tel: 415-982-2100) for plaintiff (via Zoom videoconference);
Atty. MARGARET (DEE DEE) SCHROEDER, Esq. of San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-3843) for defendant/cross-complainant City and County of San Francisco;
Atty. JASON DENG, Esq. of Ericksen Arbuthnot (Tel: 408-286-0880) for defendant/cross-defendant 3800 Washington LLC (via Zoom videoconference).

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS CHARLENE TUCHMAN, AND ELLEN ROTHMAN'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE NO. CGC-22-598595 WITH CASE NO. CGC-21-590596.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to consolidate case numbers CGC-21-590596 and CGC-21-598595 for all purposes is granted; all future filings are to be made in 590596.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
